text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Urrraaaagh! This malice! I feel malice all<n>around
me!

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Um... Is everything all right? That was so<n>sudden...

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
There's no time! Quick, put what you're<n>holding
on the ground RIGHT NOW!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
That's right! That water bottle is your<n>lucky item
for today!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
If you place your lucky item on the<n>ground, the
lucky energy will flow into<n>the space around us
and—
